name: CyberScool specialist runtime

implementation.evidence: Migration 0007, specialist runtime Worker service, typed frontend state, and Specialist Team rendering.

validation.evidence: Fresh local D1 migration and authenticated Wrangler lifecycle.

specialist_review.result: Scope, contracts, evaluation separation, revocation, and honest UI state reviewed.

security_review.result: Deny-by-default grants, workspace isolation, self-review rejection, expiry, approval, and cascading revocation verified.

required_approval.scope: Feature-branch implementation only; no merge or deployment.

residual_risks: Runtime identities and dispatch are deferred to Phase 7.
Current organization scope remains owner-derived pending production RBAC.
Evaluation evidence references are durable metadata; artifact storage is not yet implemented.
